areYouSureYouWantToContinue: Are you sure you want to continue?
locationPermissionEnabled: Location permission has been enabled. The app will now use your device location.
locationResetMessage: Your saved location has been removed. You can select a new location from the map.
permanentlyDeleteAllYourPetData: Permanently delete all your pet data
removeYourSavedLocationsAndPreferences: Remove your saved locations and preferences
resetSavedLocationMessage: This will remove your manually selected location. You will need to select a new location from the map or grant location permission.
signYouOutOfAllDevices: Sign you out of all devices
thisActionCannotBeUndone: This action cannot be undone. Deleting your account will:
turningOnLocationMobile: Turning on your location will allow us to show you nearby pet sightings. You can enable it in your device settings.
turningOnLocationWeb: Turning on your location will allow us to show you nearby pet sightings. Please open your browser settings manually to update location settings.
